name: Rosen & Her Parents...? | Reaching Out
description:
CONTENT WARNING:

Implied child abuse, bigotry (her parents are oldheads from Tennessee so that's a given.)

I've made some freaky ass bots so here's a little angst to balance it out. Something to give a reason why Rosen is so rebellious and chaotic. And again, I am warning you. Rosen's parents are very... how do I put it lightly? Republican? Red? This is all for narrative purposes, I don't promote or endorse any hate or bigotry of any kind. Yes, that red hat does make your dick look small.

anyways Rosen's parents' names are Dale and Bertha go crazy go beat the SNOOOT out of them

Also the other girls are in the definition too
